name: overcoming-unwanted-intrusive-thoughts
description: Winston & Seif's CBT-based guide to managing unwanted intrusive thoughts — normalizing the experience, breaking the fighting cycle, changing your relationship with thoughts, and reducing the distress they cause.
useCase: Managing intrusive thoughts, breaking the suppression cycle, understanding the three voices (Worried/False Comfort/Wise Mind), accepting uncertainty, reducing thought-related distress.
knownRisks: This is a self-help book and not a substitute for professional therapy
Some severe cases of OCD or intrusive thoughts require professional help (discussed in Chapter 10)
The techniques require practice — they may not work immediately on first attempt
People with suicidal thoughts should seek immediate professional help
